name: Shampoo-UGC-Husband-Scalp
body: Do you or someone you know suffer from a dry, itchy scalp? Hear what some people are saying. My husband has been suffering from scalp problems for a few years. He's been using this soap for three weeks and his scalp is totally clear. Why do people love it so much? This scalp bar is all natural and made right here in New Zealand. It's grass-fed tallow, olive oil, coconut oil, and castor oil, which work together to cleanse without stripping. Leaving your hair soft, clean, and conditioned without the itch. Tens of thousands of Kiwis are already using these bars. It's perfect for a flaky, irritated scalp that never feels clean, or for someone that just can't seem to get rid of the itch. This bar isn't just washing your hair, the tallow in it is feeding your scalp. Grab yours today at primalpantry.co.nz.

name: Tallow-Retail-Pullout-Founder
body: We tried to compete with the big skincare brands and retailers, and it almost sunk us. See, going into retail, they need your products to be comparable in price to the other products on the shelves. But if you look on the back of their products, we're playing in completely different fields. For most of these companies, water is a key ingredient. But on the back of our tallow skincare, it's the same the whole way through. Tallow and the oils that make it smell and feel good. Not only that, but their batches are in the tens or hundreds of thousands, meaning their cost of production is way lower. Trying to compete on this almost killed our brand. So I'm having to do something pretty unheard of and pull our products from the shelves of 120 retailers. Otherwise, they're going to go away for good. So next time you're grabbing a jar of PrimalCare, go to primalpantry.co.nz.

name: Scalp-Health-Bundle-Launch
body: These are two products I've been most excited to share with you, and that's for a couple of reasons. One, we've been asked for them probably every week. And two, it's something that I know people personally in my family get a lot of value from. These are liquid tallow shampoo and conditioners. Our balms are what most people know us for. They're on the shelves at over 100 shops around New Zealand. People buy them as moisturisers for dry, rashy, itchy skin. We've taken the same tallow in those and put it in these. For now, these are only available on our website, and I've just made them available. So if you want naturally silky smooth hair and a happy scalp, they could be worth a try. Get yours today at primalpantry.co.nz.

name: Reviana-Tallow-Elevated
body: After selling our skincare to over 100,000 Kiwis in the last year, I stopped and thought to myself, what if our tallow skincare wasn't just good at soothing dry and itchy skin? What if we could use it as a gentle base for actual beauty products? Meet Reviana, a homegrown spin made with the same ingredients the fancy Korean skincare products use. Available now at primalpantry.co.nz.

name: Tallow-Customer-Testimonial-Series
body: My name's Jeff, I'm in my mid-50s, and I suffer from eczema on my hands. I've tried every cream I could think of and nothing seemed to work. Then I found Primal Pantry Tallow Cream. It's amazing. After the first time I used it, the itchiness went. After about a week, the redness went. And now I use it all the time and my hands look amazing. Thank you Primal Pantry. If you want to grab a jar for yourself, go to primalpantry.co.nz. We asked our customers what they thought.

name: Reviana-We-Improved-Recipe
body: Starting to feel more dry, thin, and wrinkled? See what some people are saying about our Reviana night cream. This night cream is simply amazing. Leaves my skin feeling soft and dewy. I have noticed the redness on my skin has reduced dramatically. My skin feels firmer. So why are so many people loving it? Our Reviana night cream is made with the same nourishing tallow that's used in our balms, trusted by over 90,000 Kiwis, but with added benefits for your skin. We've paired it with powerful actives like bakuchiol, niacinamide, ceramides, and hyaluronic acid to help restore, smooth, and firm your skin while you sleep. Because tallow is so compatible with your skin, it helps support the barrier and works beautifully alongside these targeted actives to deeply absorb into the skin. With consistent use, fine lines appear softer, skin looks more even, and your complexion feels more plump, smoother, and more hydrated. So why are hundreds of our customers falling in love with Reviana? Because it gives you the benefits of tallow without the tallow smell, in a formula specifically made for delicate facial skin and the concerns our customers told us they want help with. It's lightweight, nourishing, and packed with skin-loving ingredients. Grab yours today at primalpantry.co.nz.

name: Tallow-Customer-Testimonial-Series
body: These are the top three things our customers are saying about the tallow bars. I've been using these products for nine months now and wow, it's helped my skin so much. My skin is so much smoother and clearer. Brilliant product. Now I can't go without it. This is your sign. Grab a jar today at primalpantry.co.nz.
